competitors.name: OpenAI / ChatGPT
fetched_urls: WebSearch: OpenAI ChatGPT new feature announcement July 22 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: "Advertise in ChatGPT" OpenAI Ads Manager launch July 22 2026 quote (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: 官方RSS持续403，转WebSearch。发现baseline未记录的新事件：2026-07-22 OpenAI正式开放"Advertise in ChatGPT"自助式Ads Manager平台，广告主可创建campaign、设置预算、基于对话上下文（而非仅搜索关键词）定向投放；早期案例包括Best Buy、Lowe's、VistaPrint。该发布重新引发对Altman 2024年"Ads plus AI is sort of uniquely unsettling to me"言论的讨论。属商业模式/广告业务变化，未触及meee2差异化锚点（session协议、live link、descriptive-first、artifact pull、peripheral层均未涉及）。
competitors.content_hash: 官方RSS持续403，转WebSearch。发现baseline未记录的新事件：2026-07-22 OpenAI正式开放

changes.description: OpenAI于7/22正式开放ChatGPT自助广告平台Ads Manager，基于对话上下文定向投放，Best Buy/Lowe's/VistaPrint为早期案例
changes.evidence: 「Best Buy's VP of Media, Amy Adams, framing the move as meeting customers 'in those moments' of research and decision-making that increasingly happen inside a chat window instead of a search bar.」

key_findings: Ads Manager为商业化/广告业务动作，未触及meee2差异化锚点，不构成结构性威胁信号
openai.com/news/rss.xml本轮持续403无法直连核实官方原文

competitors.name: Claude.ai / Anthropic
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Anthropic Claude new feature announcement July 22 2026 site:anthropic.com (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: 直连Claude Code CHANGELOG核实。版本从baseline记录的v2.1.216前进至v2.1.217：新增emoji shortcode自动补全、修复MCP工具输出内存泄漏、改进Windows自动更新可靠性、增强屏幕阅读器支持、修复多项权限与session管理问题。另WebSearch发现Claude Platform release notes显示Opus 4.7 fast mode已弃用，将于7/24移除，建议用户迁移至Opus 4.8 fast mode；agent-memory-2026-07-22 beta header为baseline已记录事项的延续。anthropic.com本轮未见7/21-7/22新公告（Claude Design/新宪法均为6月既有发布）。
competitors.content_hash: 直连Claude Code CHANGELOG核实。版本从baseline记录的v2.1.216前进至v2.1.217：新增emoji shortcode自动补全

changes.description: Claude Code CHANGELOG新增v2.1.217，核心为emoji自动补全、MCP工具输出内存泄漏修复、Windows自动更新与屏幕阅读器改进
changes.evidence: 「Added emoji shortcode autocomplete, fixed memory leaks in MCP tool outputs, improved Windows auto-update reliability, enhanced screen reader support, and addressed various permission and session management issues.」

changes.description: Claude Platform弃用Opus 4.7 fast mode，7/24移除，引导用户迁移至Opus 4.8 fast mode
changes.evidence: 「Fast mode for Claude Opus 4.7 was deprecated, with removal on July 24, 2026」

key_findings: v2.1.217与Opus 4.7 fast mode弃用均为常规产品维护/生命周期管理，未触及meee2差异化锚点
docs.anthropic.com/en/release-notes/overview本轮403，相关内容依赖WebSearch转述

competitors.name: Google Gemini / AI Studio
fetched_urls: WebSearch: Google Gemini AI Studio new feature announcement July 22 2026 (ok)
WebSearch: Gemini 3.6 Flash announcement quote Google blog July 21 2026 (ok)
competitors.raw_snapshot: Tier1及官方changelog页均403，转WebSearch。发现baseline未记录的新发布：Google于7/21发布三款新模型——Gemini 3.6 Flash（3.5 Flash直接继任者，Artificial Analysis Index上输出token减少约17%，多步任务所需推理步骤/工具调用更少）、Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite、Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber（面向政府/受信任合作伙伴的安全定制模型，用于漏洞发现/验证/修复）。同时确认Gemini 3.5 Pro多次延期未发布，Google已启动Gemini 4的预训练。均为模型能力/性能迭代，未触及meee2差异化锚点（无session/canvas/artifact live link相关表述）。
competitors.content_hash: Tier1及官方changelog页均403，转WebSearch。发现baseline未记录的新发布：Google于7/21发布三款新模型

changes.description: Google发布Gemini 3.6 Flash / 3.5 Flash-Lite / 3.5 Flash Cyber三款新模型，主打agentic workload的token效率与延迟
changes.evidence: 「Our newest Gemini models deliver the efficiency, latency, and reliability to build AI agents at scale.」

key_findings: 新模型为底层能力/成本优化，非工作流/协作范式变化，未触及meee2差异化锚点
Gemini 3.5 Pro持续跳票，Gemini 4已进入预训练阶段，供后续观察
